title: agent-gorgon: tool-fabrication defense for AI agents
description: agent-gorgon is an AI reliability tool that stops AI agents from fabricating tool output when a registered tool exists, using a three-layer Claude Code hook defense (UserPromptSubmit injects matching tools into context, Stop blocks responses whose structured artifacts match a manifest schema with no tool invoked, and a PreToolUse Bash matcher blocks shell reimplementation of a registered tool). It is verification by effect against a silent failure mode that evals and observability miss: confabulated output indistinguishable from real tool results.
